economic_notes: Upper Nicola Holdings Limited Partnership (wholly owned GBE) and Stuwix Resources Joint Venture (non-controlling interest) accounted for by modified equity method. Stuwix Resources Joint Venture had revenue of $22,299,204 in 2021. Contract services provided to Stuwix totalled $1,089,702 in 2021.
notes: Fiscal year 2021 (ended March 31, 2021). Auditor firm name not explicitly stated - report signed 'Chartered Professional Accountants' in Vancouver. Prior period restated due to change in funded reserves liability policy (opening surplus increased by $549,059). COVID-19 pandemic disclosed with material uncertainty note. Two GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: Upper Nicola Holdings Limited Partnership (wholly owned) and Stuwix Resources Joint Venture (non-controlling interest). Total government transfers estimated as ISC ($5,814,658) + FNHA ($1,524,049) + CMHC ($163,188) + ISETS ($61,917) + FNESC ($324,069) + Other Province of BC ($374,971) + Other government funding ($329614) = $8,592,466 plus ISC recovery adjustment of -$125,343 and deferred revenue adjustments included in revenue lines. OSR calculated as total revenue minus estimated government transfers. Tangible capital assets net book value $9,746,002 per schedule. No remuneration schedule found in extracted text.
